title: A pop up as part of automations
excerpt:

posts.author: mitchellgp (Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml:
An alert automation would completely change the way my team worked on monday.com. Having a window pop up with information about what they are about to do would be a game changer.

For example, changing a status to complete but before the automation runs to move that item to a different group, you get a pop up alert that says “Hey you’re about to mark this as complete but have not filled out the xyz column” With buttons to either undo or continue the automation.

Or even just for informing staff on what is about to happen, for example, “By checking this box, xyz will be notified and the item will move from this board, are you sure you want to continue”. It’d be a GAME CHANEGR
